title: Indie Cross: Reimagned
description: IndieCross is a modpack that combines the worlds of Undertale, Hollow Knight, Dead Cells, and other iconic indie games into Minecraft from series Indie Cross by MORØ
body:
🕹️ Indie Cross: Reimagned – Minecraft Modpack

Dive into a world where legendary indie games collide!
This pack offers a unique experience: battles, exploration, and adventures with your favorite characters.

✨ What’s Inside:

Undertale – souls, Sans, and references to the Underground.

Hollow Knight – the Knight, dark dungeons, and the Hallownest atmosphere.

Dead Cells – fast-paced combat and stylish environments.

OneShot – Niko and a mysterious world.

And many more mods inspired by the best indie projects!

🎮 Features:

A balance between adventure and combat.

Mods adding new mobs, items, and abilities.

Choose your path: become a hero, a monster, or an explorer.

The atmosphere of a true indie crossover right inside Minecraft.

🌟 If you’re a fan of Undertale, Hollow Knight, Dead Cells, or OneShot — this modpack is made for you!![Indie Cross](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/924c5e8f66586bf7ba02dc07cb709523bb49f1cf_0.webp)
